source: Creator Monetize — Email Mastery, Promo Template, Reactivation, Webinar Sequences

email_types.sequences: Automated series triggered by action (e.g., opt-in → 7-day nurture)
email_types.broadcasts: Manual one-time email to all/part of list

three_pillars: Increase pain points (stories, reminders of current situation)

emails.name: Pre-launch Teaser
emails.purpose: VIP framing, build anticipation, set reminder

emails.name: Offer Reveal
emails.purpose: Zero-to-hero story, bonuses, urgency, testimonial in P.S.

emails.name: Checking In
emails.purpose: Personal story, social proof via 5+ reviews

emails.name: Last 24 Hours
emails.purpose: Full recap, bonuses re-listed, guarantee in P.S.

emails.name: Last 6 Hours
emails.purpose: Countdown timer, objection handling in P.S.

reactivation.name: Quick Activation — Dormant List Reactivation
strategy: Give easy exit (unsubscribe to clean list)

emails.purpose: Sell them on watching the free training. DO NOT sell product.
Paint dream outcome (80-90%), soft product mention (10-20%)
Destroy biggest limiting belief via stories/examples/facts
Social proof / case study + product reminder
Hard sell: where would you be if you joined 7 days ago?

timing_arc.purpose: Welcome + urgency triggers (not recorded, limited spots, free gift for live)

ai_email_writing.prompt_template: You're an expert in {NICHE} writing an email to subscribers with the goal of: nurturing, increasing pain points, destroying limiting beliefs, making them know/like/trust you more. The end goal is to get them to click through to purchase. Tone: {DESIRED_TONE}. Not too direct with selling — nurture and educate with light CTA at end/P.S.
editing_checklist: Replace words NOT in your voice
Break up lines for easier read
